components.name: Three.js Wireframe Background
components.description: Fixed fullscreen canvas with a rotating wireframe TorusKnot and 2500 floating particles. Mouse parallax on camera and mesh.
components.css: #three-canvas { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; z-index: 0; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: GSAP ScrollTrigger Animations
components.description: Scroll-triggered reveal animations for sections, cards, and elements with stagger support.

selector.description: CSS selector for elements to animate

gridItemSelector.description: CSS selector for staggered grid items

components.name: GSAP TextPlugin Typewriter
components.description: Typewriter text effect using GSAP TextPlugin. Useful for hero subtitles or dynamic text reveals.
components.css:
.typewriter-cursor { display: inline-block; width: 2px; height: 1em; background: {{cursorColor}}; margin-left: 2px; animation: blink 1s step-end infinite; }
@keyframes blink { 50% { opacity: 0; } }

components.name: GSAP Counter Animation
components.description: Animated number counter triggered on scroll. Supports prefix, suffix, decimals, and locale formatting.
components.html_template:
0
{{label}}

components.name: Aceternity 3D Tilt Cards
components.description: Cards with perspective 3D tilt on mouse move, cursor-following glow effect, and smooth reset on mouse leave.
components.html_template:
{{icon}}

{{title}}

{{description}}

{{tag}}

components.name: Aceternity Flip Words
components.description: Vertically flipping word rotator using pure CSS animation. Words cycle through with a sliding transition.
components.html_template: {{word1}} {{word2}} {{word3}} {{word4}} {{word1}}

word1.description: First word (also repeated at end for seamless loop)

components.name: Aceternity Meteors
components.description: Animated meteor shower with glowing head and gradient trail. Randomized positions, speeds, and delays.

components.name: Aceternity Glowing Stars
components.description: Randomly positioned glowing star dots with pulsating opacity and color-shifting box-shadow. Generated via JS.

glowColor1.description: Star glow color at dim state

glowColor2.description: Star glow color at bright state

components.name: Aceternity Moving Borders
components.description: Rotating conic-gradient border animation around a card. Uses an inner pseudo-element mask to create the border illusion.

components.name: Magic UI Border Beam
components.description: Animated conic-gradient border beam using CSS @property for smooth angle interpolation. Falls back to moving-border for unsupported browsers.

components.name: Magic UI Gradient Text
components.description: Animated multi-color gradient text with shifting background-position for a flowing color effect.
components.css:
.gradient-text { background: linear-gradient(90deg, {{color1}}, {{color2}}, {{color3}}, {{color4}}, {{color1}}); background-size: 400% 100%; -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; animation: gradientShift {{speed}} ease infinite; }
@keyframes gradientShift { 0% { background-position: 0% 50%; } 50% { background-position: 100% 50%; } 100% { background-position: 0% 50%; } }

components.name: Magic UI Floating Particles
components.description: Small colored dots that float upward from bottom to top of viewport with random sizes, positions, and speeds.
components.css:
.floating-particle { position: fixed; border-radius: 50%; pointer-events: none; z-index: 0; animation: particleFloat linear infinite; }
@keyframes particleFloat { 0% { transform: translateY(100vh) scale(0); opacity: 0; } 10% { opacity: 1; } 90% { opacity: 1; } 100% { transform: translateY(-100vh) scale(1); opacity: 0; } }

maxSize.description: Additional random max size in px

components.name: Magic UI Wave Dividers
components.description: Animated SVG wave section dividers with gradient fill and morphing path animation.
components.css:
.wave-divider { position: relative; z-index: 1; height: {{height}}; overflow: hidden; }
.wave-divider svg { position: absolute; bottom: 0; width: 100%; height: {{height}}; }

components.name: Apple Glass Buttons
components.description: Glassmorphism buttons with backdrop-filter blur, gradient backgrounds, shimmer sweep on hover, and optional magnetic cursor attraction.

arrowSvg.default: <svg width="18" height="18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M5 12h14m-7-7 7 7-7 7"/></svg>

components.name: Fintech Trust/Metrics Cards
components.description: Stat metric cards with top gradient accent bar, shimmer loading state, counter number, and label. Used for social proof trust indicators.

{{value1}}
{{label1}}
{{value2}}
{{label2}}
{{value3}}
{{label3}}
{{value4}}
{{label4}}
